title: Testing Assistant Officer (Elevator / Japan MNC) AL70
description:
Job Description :

Involvement in all engineering work on newly installed equipment pertaining to testing and commissioning for both installation and modernization project. Includes identify defects, failure analysis, failure restoration and engineering improvement.

Duties & Responsibilities :

  • Duty covers any engineering matter pertaining to the function and operation of  the equipment.

  • Testing, commissioning of newly installed equipment for both installation and modernization project.

  • Assist in planning, schedule and distribution of work to subordinates.

  • Attend to safety and performance related breakdown of equipment.

  • Assist in planning and implementation of new measures to improve performance of equipment.

  • Assist in investigation and provide recommendation for improvement on technical failures of the equipment.

  • Assist in controlling and monitoring of all instruments used by subordinates within the department  are properly documented and calibrated.

  • Assist in technical training of subordinates within the department.

  • Ensure compliance to Environmental Policy, reduction of waste and prevention of pollution and WSHA regulation.

  • Any other duties assigned by superior.

Requirement:

  • Min Diploma or Degree in Mechanical, Electrical, or related engineering discipline.

  • Basic understanding of mechanical/electrical systems is a plus.

  • Strong organizational and administrative skills.

  • Ability to work in a team and follow instructions.



HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or submit your resume to ref70@trustrecruit.com.sg

Please include the following information:

-          Reason for leaving

-          Expected Salary

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd
